goal: Vision-guided depalletization: a Franka arm depallettizes a 2x3 grid of 0.10m boxes from a pallet, layer by layer. An overhead camera is positioned above the pallet; vision_detect_objects scans the top-layer boxes each cycle and returns their normalized viewport positions. compute_stack_placement pre-computes the 6 grid pick positions (grid_2x3, anchor='top') as world coords. These are passed as source_paths + drop_targets to setup_pick_place_controller. After each box is cleared, a new vision_detect_objects call verifies the slot is vacated before the next pick. Exercises vision_detect_objects for runtime pallet-state polling, compute_stack_placement for grid geometry, and set_camera_look_at for nadir overhead camera alignment.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-vision-depalletize:

1) Distinctiveness: Depalletization is the INVERSE of palletizing. The key novelty is vision_detect_objects polling the pallet top-surface each cycle to locate the topmost visible boxes, combined with compute_stack_placement to pre-compute expected pick positions. No existing canonical combines vision polling with compute_stack_placement as the geometric oracle. CP-43 (palletizer-layer-stack) builds up; this breaks down. Overlap with CP-43 is minimal: different tool chain, different pattern direction.

2) Robot and reach: Franka (reach 0.85m) on a 0.75m table. Pallet at [0, 0.50, 0.775] (in front of robot). 6 boxes (0.10m each) in grid_2x3. Grid centre at pallet centre. Max horizontal reach to far pallet corner: sqrt(0.15^2 + (0.50+0.10)^2) = 0.618m — inside 0.85m. outfeed_bin at [0, -0.45, 0.80] (behind robot), reach sqrt(0^2+0.45^2)=0.45m — fine.

3) compute_stack_placement call: target='/World/Pallet', pattern='grid_2x3', n_items=6, cube_size=0.10, spacing=0.12, anchor='top'. Pallet top_z = 0.775+0.025=0.800. Drop_z (box centre on pallet) = 0.800+0.05=0.850. Grid: col offsets x=[-0.12,+0.12], row offsets y=[0.42, 0.50, 0.58] (pallet_y=0.50, rows at -0.08,0,+0.08). Source pick-z = same 0.850 (single-layer canonical).

4) Overhead camera: placed at [0, 0.50, 1.80] (2m above pallet surface). set_camera_look_at(eye=[0,0.50,1.80], target=[0,0.50,0.850]). set_camera_params(focal_length=18.0, horizontal_aperture=20.955) gives ~60deg HFOV at 1.80m height, covering the full 0.35m-wide pallet. semantic labels on boxes ('box_1'..'box_6') — vision_detect_objects(labels=['box']) returns all visible box positions.

5) source_paths ordering: compute_stack_placement returns positions in row-major order (row0 first = farthest from robot at y=0.58 in this layout). Use that order as source_paths so the robot picks row-far first (avoids arm-over-box collision for near rows).

6) Vision poll pattern: vision_detect_objects(labels=['box'], max_objects=6) is called once before setup_pick_place_controller as a pre-check. The real runtime iteration logic lives inside the pick-place controller; the canonical shows the single-call pattern that an agent would use for state-check between cycles.

7) drop_targets: all 6 boxes map to outfeed_bin interior at [0, -0.45, 0.85] (single drop zone — depalletizer unloads to one zone).

8) Physics: CPU dynamics (MBP), rubber material, sleepThreshold=0.0. Boxes settled before first pick.

9) Proximity sensor at outfeed_bin confirms box arrival.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Robot table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU dynamics for determinism ─────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka arm (reach 0.85m) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Pallet at y=0.50 (in front). Max grid corner reach ~0.62m — inside 0.85m.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[1, 0, 0, 0],
)

# ── Pallet (0.70x0.50x0.05m platform) ────────────────────────────────────────
# scale=[0.35, 0.25, 0.025]: USD Cube 2m unit -> half-extents.
# Pallet top z = 0.775 + 0.025 = 0.800.
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/Pallet",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, 0.50, 0.775],
    scale=[0.35, 0.25, 0.025],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pallet", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 6 boxes (0.10m) in 2x3 grid on pallet ────────────────────────────────────
# compute_stack_placement: grid_2x3, cube_size=0.10, spacing=0.12, anchor='top'
# pallet_top_z=0.800; box_centre_z=0.800+0.05=0.850.
# col_x: [-0.12, +0.12]; row_y: [0.42, 0.50, 0.58] (pallet_cy=0.50, offsets -0.08,0,+0.08)
_stack = compute_stack_placement(
    target_path="/World/Pallet",
    n_items=6,
    pattern="grid_2x3",
    cube_size=0.10,
    spacing=0.12,
    anchor="top",
)

# Fallback grid if compute returns no data at build time
_grid_positions = [
    [-0.12, 0.42, 0.850], [ 0.12, 0.42, 0.850],
    [-0.12, 0.50, 0.850], [ 0.12, 0.50, 0.850],
    [-0.12, 0.58, 0.850], [ 0.12, 0.58, 0.850],
]
if isinstance(_stack, dict) and _stack.get("positions"):
    _grid_positions = [p["position"] for p in _stack["positions"]]

box_paths = [f"/World/Box_{i+1}" for i in range(6)]

for i, (path, pos) in enumerate(zip(box_paths, _grid_positions)):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, size=0.10)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name="box")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=box_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in box_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── Outfeed bin (behind robot) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(
    prim_path="/World/OutfeedBin",
    prim_type="Cube",
    position=[0, -0.45, 0.775],
    scale=[0.30, 0.20, 0.025],
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/OutfeedBin", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Outfeed arrival sensor
add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/ArrivalSensor",
    position=[0, -0.45, 0.870],
    size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.08],
)

# ── Overhead inspection camera ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Nadir view from 1.80m above pallet. ~60deg HFOV covers full 0.70m pallet width.
create_prim(prim_path="/World/PalletCam", prim_type="Camera")
set_camera_params(
    camera_path="/World/PalletCam",
    params={"focal_length": 18.0, "horizontal_aperture": 20.955},
)
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path="/World/PalletCam",
    target=[0.0, 0.50, 0.850],
    eye=[0.0, 0.50, 1.80],
)

# ── Vision poll: verify boxes are visible before pick sequence ────────────────
# Returns normalized 2D points and labels for up to 6 boxes.
# In live use: agent calls this between pick cycles to track remaining boxes.
_vision_result = vision_detect_objects(
    labels=["box"],
    max_objects=6,
)

# ── cuRobo pick-place — row-far first (y=0.58 row), row-near last ─────────────
# source_paths in row-major far-to-near order avoids arm-over-box collision.
source_order = [
    "/World/Box_5", "/World/Box_6",
    "/World/Box_3", "/World/Box_4",
    "/World/Box_1", "/World/Box_2",
]
drop_targets = {p: [0, -0.45, 0.850] for p in source_order}

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=source_order,
    destination_path="/World/OutfeedBin",
    drop_targets=drop_targets,
    planning_obstacles=[
        "/World/Table",
        "/World/Pallet",
        "/World/OutfeedBin",
    ],
    sensor_path="/World/ArrivalSensor",
)
failure_modes: compute_stack_placement returns empty at build time — positions fallback to baked _grid_positions list. Ensure pallet has authored bbox (PhysicsCollisionAPI applied) before calling compute_stack_placement.

vision_detect_objects called before overhead camera is active — the PalletCam is created at build time but may not be the active render product. set_viewport_camera('/World/PalletCam') before calling vision_detect_objects ensures the correct view. In CI harness, set viewport camera first.

Far-row boxes (y=0.58) unreachable at table height — Franka EE reaches y=0.58+0.12 pallet_half = 0.70m from robot base. At table z=0.75, full reach envelope is 0.85m. Adding table height to max_h gives 0.85m — still feasible. If cuRobo rejects, raise table 0.05m to z=0.80 and adjust pallet z accordingly.

Box slides off pallet before pick — low rubber friction at edges. Apply rubber physics_material on Pallet too; boxes land with sufficient friction. Alternatively increase pallet scale y from 0.25 to 0.30 to widen landing area.

source_order out of sync with _grid_positions — if compute_stack_placement reorders positions (e.g. row-near first), source_order hardcoded as far-to-near may mismatch. In production use, sort returned positions by descending y then x to guarantee consistent order.
code_template:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.6, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_prim(
    prim_path={{source_pallet.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{source_pallet.position}},
    scale={{source_pallet.scale}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{source_pallet.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

_stack = compute_stack_placement(
    target_path={{source_pallet.path}},
    n_items=6,
    pattern="grid_2x3",
    cube_size=0.10,
    spacing=0.12,
    anchor="top",
)

box_paths = [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}, {{workpieces[5].path}}]

for i, (path, pos) in enumerate(zip(box_paths, [{{workpieces[0].position}}, {{workpieces[1].position}}, {{workpieces[2].position}}, {{workpieces[3].position}}, {{workpieces[4].position}}, {{workpieces[5].position}}])):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, size=0.10)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name="box")

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=box_paths, attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in box_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_prim(
    prim_path={{destination_bin.path}},
    prim_type="Cube",
    position={{destination_bin.position}},
    scale={{destination_bin.scale}},
)
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{destination_bin.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/ArrivalSensor",
    position=[0, -0.45, 0.870],
    size=[0.25, 0.25, 0.08],
)

create_prim(prim_path={{overhead_camera.path}}, prim_type="Camera")
set_camera_params(
    camera_path={{overhead_camera.path}},
    params={"focal_length": 18.0, "horizontal_aperture": 20.955},
)
set_camera_look_at(
    camera_path={{overhead_camera.path}},
    target={{overhead_camera.target}},
    eye={{overhead_camera.eye}},
)

_vision_result = vision_detect_objects(
    labels=["box"],
    max_objects=6,
)

drop_targets = {p: [0, -0.45, 0.850] for p in box_paths}

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=box_paths,
    destination_path={{destination_bin.path}},
    drop_targets=drop_targets,
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{source_pallet.path}}, {{destination_bin.path}}],
    sensor_path="/World/ArrivalSensor",
)
